flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at City College of San Francisco rose 68% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.7k → $14.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at City College of San Francisco rose 45% between 2021 and 2024 ($1.2k → $1.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 36% at City College of San Francisco vs the 2004–2008 baseline (16.1k vs 25.0k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at City College of San Francisco rose 27% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.8k → $4.8k).
